prompt: Create a realistic vertical concert photo of a cheerful young Japanese idol singer named a smiling idol singer performing on a small live-house stage. She is shown from mid-thigh upward in a dynamic close perspective, leaning toward the camera, smiling with her mouth open while singing, holding exactly 1 black handheld microphone in her right hand and reaching her left arm toward the viewer with a playful pointing gesture. She wears a glossy white Chinese-inspired idol dress, a fitted sleeveless qipao-style mini dress with pale floral brocade texture, gold piping, black frog closures, black trim, and a front slit; use ivory white with gold and black accents. Her hair is dark brown, styled with straight bangs and exactly 2 small messy side buns, decorated with exactly 2 white floral hair ornaments and trailing white ribbons. The stage background is dim and industrial, with dark ceiling beams, concrete walls, shallow depth of field, and exactly 2 bright circular stage lights glowing behind her, creating warm rim light and bokeh. Use a high-quality DSLR concert photography look, natural skin tones, sharp focus on her face and microphone, slight motion energy in the extended hand, 3:4 vertical composition, intimate idol performance atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
